\tzpentry{ID3583}{Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3583 introduces Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\frac{d}{dt}\left(\mathcal{H}_M + \frac{\lambda_g}{\mu_0}\mathcal{H}_{ac}\right) = 0$$
